name: myfund-cli
description: Agent-first JSON CLI for querying myFund portfolio data.

scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const path=require('node:path');const target=path.resolve('dist');if(path.basename(target)!=='dist'||path.dirname(target)!==process.cwd())throw new Error('Refusing to clean unexpected path: '+target);fs.rmSync(target,{recursive:true,force:true});"
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && npm audit
